node.name: University College London
node.summary: UCL Robotics Lab — UR5e teleoperation research, sim2real gap quantification, and remote control latency analysis. Open to collaboration on federated robotics benchmarking and cross-institutional dataset sharing.

co_creation_card.title: UCL Robotics SONAIR Sub-Portal
co_creation_card.description: Evidence dashboard for UCL–Nottingham UR5e teleoperation experiment. Features sim2real gap metrics, RTT analysis, and command latency profiling for the SONAIR network.
